query_window.note: arXiv submitted-date exact-day query returned zero relevant new submissions; patrol expanded to recent papers surfaced or updated by today's cross-source scan, excluding red-team/backdoor/security-only work.

papers.title: PolicyShiftGuard: Benchmarking and Improving Policy-Adaptive Image Guardrails
affiliations: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
papers.source: arXiv / Project page / 今日巡检高相关治理论文

zh.method_overview: PolicyShiftGuard 关注生产审核中最常见但学术基准较少覆盖的问题：同一张图在不同地区、年龄层、广告主或平台政策下可能从允许变成禁止。论文先构造 PolicyShiftBench，把 265 张图扩展为 2,000 个 policy-conditioned 实例、28 个政策变体，并提出 PSS 衡量模型能否处理同图 policy flip。方法上先用 Randomized Policy SFT 让模型阅读完整政策包并输出结构化判定，再用 Boundary-Pair Policy Adaptation 对同图同风险类别的 pass/block 边界对做成对学习。高光点是把“识别风险内容”与“遵循运行时政策”解耦，特别适合电商内容治理里分国家、分达人等级、分商品类目的动态规则。
zh.story: 固定安全分类器会把图片安全性当作图像固有属性 -> 真实电商/社区治理的政策会随地区、品类、年龄、广告主要求变化 -> 需要让 VLM 显式读取 policy bundle，并用同图 pass/block 边界对训练模型学习政策翻转。
zh.innovation: 创新合理且工程价值强。与传统 unsafe image benchmark 或固定 taxonomies 不同，PolicyShiftBench 强制同一视觉证据在不同政策下产生不同标签，PSS 直接惩罚只会识别敏感视觉元素、不懂政策边界的模型；BP-Adapt 的 matched boundary pair 也比单纯 SFT 更贴近审核策略变更时的真实决策边界。
zh.key_metrics: PolicyShiftGuard-7B 在 PolicyShiftBench 上达到 76.9 Avg. F1 与 72.1 Avg. PSS；相对 Qwen2.5-VL-7B，Avg. F1 从 20.6 提升到 76.9，Avg. PSS 从 4.8 提升到 72.1；推理延迟从基础模型 273.3ms 降到 163.9ms。PolicyShiftBench 含 2,000 eval instances、265 images、28 policies。

en.method_overview: PolicyShiftGuard targets a production moderation failure mode: the same image may be allowed under one active policy but blocked under another. The paper builds PolicyShiftBench with 2,000 policy-conditioned instances over 265 images and 28 policy variants, then introduces PSS to measure same-image policy flips. The model is trained with Randomized Policy SFT for policy-bundle following and Boundary-Pair Policy Adaptation for matched pass/block examples. The highlight is separating visual risk recognition from runtime policy compliance, which maps directly to marketplace governance with region-, category-, and creator-level rules.
en.story: Fixed safety classifiers treat safety as an intrinsic image property -> real governance policies shift by region, age, advertiser, or category -> the model must explicitly read policy bundles and learn pass/block boundary pairs for identical visual evidence.
en.innovation: Unlike fixed unsafe-image benchmarks, PolicyShiftBench forces policy-conditioned label flips for the same image, and PSS directly evaluates policy sensitivity. BP-Adapt is a practical training innovation because matched pass/block pairs focus learning on policy boundaries rather than generic unsafe recognition.
en.key_metrics: PolicyShiftGuard-7B reaches 76.9 Avg. F1 and 72.1 Avg. PSS on PolicyShiftBench; compared with Qwen2.5-VL-7B, Avg. F1 improves from 20.6 to 76.9 and Avg. PSS from 4.8 to 72.1, while latency drops from 273.3ms to 163.9ms. The benchmark contains 2,000 eval instances, 265 images, and 28 policies.

score.rationale_zh: 强相关治理论文。benchmark、metric、训练方法和消融都完整，指标提升非常明显；已有项目页、HuggingFace 模型/数据与 GitHub 代码，已确认代码仓库存在，因此不重复复现。

papers.title: UNIVID: Unified Vision-Language Model for Video Moderation
papers.source: arXiv / DBLP / 今日巡检强相关治理论文

zh.method_overview: UNIVID 把视频审核从上千个黑盒政策分类器，改造成一个统一的 policy-aware captioning VLM。模型基于 LLaVA-OneVision/Mistral-7B 风格架构，用人工精修标签与高质量合成数据做政策对齐，输出可给人审查的违规证据 caption。系统侧将 UNIVID caption/embedding 复用于 Risk Filter、Moderation Actor 和 Trend Governance 三段链路，并通过 UNIVID-Lite 与 UNIVID-RAG 支撑决策与漏审召回。高光点是“caption 作为中间治理表征”：既提升可解释性，又能复用给趋势发现、广告安全和推荐安全。
zh.story: 传统视频审核依赖大量 policy-specific 黑盒分类器，维护成本高、解释性弱、政策更新慢 -> 需要一个统一、可解释、可复用的多模态内容表征 -> UNIVID 用政策感知 caption 连接视频理解、审核动作与趋势治理。
zh.innovation: 创新主要在工业系统范式：不是只做一个离线 VLM benchmark，而是把 caption VLM 作为治理基础设施的核心表征层。与通用 VLM 相比，UNIVID 针对违规内容减少拒答并对齐内部政策；与传统分类器相比，它用自然语言证据减少排障成本，且通过缓存 embedding/caption 支持多业务复用。
zh.key_metrics: 线上系统 view-weighted violation leakage 相对下降 42.7%，从 0.255% 降至 0.146%；overkill rate 从 35.4% 降至 22.3%，相对下降 37.0%；广告业务 beta simulation 达到 81% matching accuracy；推理成本约 180 美元/百万视频，相比商业 VLM 的 >3,000 美元降低约 15×。

en.method_overview: UNIVID replaces thousands of policy-specific black-box video classifiers with a unified policy-aware captioning VLM. Built in the LLaVA-OneVision/Mistral-7B style, it uses expert-refined labels plus synthetic data to align captions with moderation policy. The production pipeline reuses UNIVID captions and embeddings across Risk Filter, Moderation Actor, and Trend Governance, with UNIVID-Lite and UNIVID-RAG supporting decisions and leakage recall. Its highlight is treating captions as an interpretable governance representation reusable across moderation, ads safety, and recommendation safety.
en.story: Traditional video moderation depends on many opaque policy classifiers with high maintenance cost and weak interpretability -> governance needs a unified, auditable, reusable multimodal representation -> UNIVID uses policy-aware captions to connect video understanding, enforcement actions, and trend discovery.
en.innovation: The main novelty is an industrial system paradigm: a caption VLM becomes the representation layer for governance infrastructure. Compared with generic VLMs it avoids refusal and aligns with fine-grained policies; compared with classifiers it provides natural-language evidence and reusable cached features.
en.key_metrics: The deployed system reduces view-weighted violation leakage by 42.7%, from 0.255% to 0.146%, and reduces overkill rate by 37.0%, from 35.4% to 22.3%. It also reaches 81% matching accuracy in ads beta simulation and costs about $180 per million videos, roughly 15x lower than commercial VLMs above $3,000.

score.rationale_zh: 与电商内容生态、视频内容理解和治理强相关，且有真实工业效果。论文未发现公开代码，因此已按方法复现 toy 版 UNIVID pipeline。

papers.title: SynthAVE: Scalable Synthetic Labeling for E-Commerce with LLM-Arena Validation
papers.source: arXiv / Semantic Scholar / 今日巡检强相关电商数据质量论文

zh.method_overview: SynthAVE 面向电商属性值抽取的数据质量瓶颈：产品类型、属性和语言组合爆炸，使人工标注成本不可承受。论文构建 12,726 个产品、229 个产品类型、792 个属性、4 种语言的人类验证 benchmark，并用 7 个模型家族 × 3 个 prompts 组成 21 个 judge configuration 进行多数投票审核。核心不是让单个 LLM 当裁判，而是利用模型多样性抵消偏差，并把低一致性样本作为需要人工复核的重点。高光点是把合成标注、自动质检和人工 triage 串成可规模化的数据清洗闭环。
zh.story: 跨品类、跨属性、跨语言的电商 AVE 需要海量标签，纯人工太贵，单模型合成标签又有系统性偏差 -> 需要可校准、可分流人工复核的质量控制机制 -> SynthAVE 用多模型 arena 多数投票与 disagreement-based triage 提升标签可靠性。
zh.innovation: 创新点非常贴近数据治理：它不是只报告 LLM 生成标签，而是把 21 个异质 judge 的一致性当作置信度信号，结合人工抽检验证多数投票质量。相比单 LLM judge 或分类器过滤，多模型 arena 更适合属性 schema 多变、多语言、多品类的电商目录。
zh.key_metrics: 数据集覆盖 12,726 products、229 product categories、792 attributes 和 4 languages；多数投票与人类专家 Cohen’s κ=0.92、95.2% agreement；个体 judge 的 Fleiss’ κ=0.757；作为数据清洗机制将原始合成管线 92.6% accuracy 提升到约 97%，错误纠正率 83.1%，F1=96.6%；总验证成本 290.50 美元，即每千产品 22.83 美元。

en.method_overview: SynthAVE addresses the data-quality bottleneck in e-commerce attribute value extraction, where product types, attributes, and languages create combinatorial labeling cost. It builds a human-validated benchmark of 12,726 products, 229 product types, 792 attributes, and 4 languages, then validates synthetic labels with 21 judge configurations from 7 model families and 3 prompts. The key idea is not relying on a single LLM judge, but using judge diversity and majority voting while routing low-agreement cases to human review. The highlight is a scalable loop for synthetic labeling, automated QA, and targeted human triage.
en.story: Multilingual e-commerce AVE needs massive labels, pure human annotation is too expensive, and single-model synthetic labels can be biased -> scalable quality control is needed -> SynthAVE combines multi-model arena voting with disagreement-based triage to improve label reliability.
en.innovation: The novelty is highly practical for data governance: 21 heterogeneous judges provide both labels and confidence signals via agreement levels. Compared with a single LLM judge or classifier filtering, the arena design is better suited to evolving product schemas, multilingual catalogs, and cross-category ambiguity.
en.key_metrics: The benchmark spans 12,726 products, 229 product categories, 792 attributes, and 4 languages. Majority voting reaches Cohen’s κ=0.92 and 95.2% agreement with human experts, with Fleiss’ κ=0.757 among judges. As data cleaning, it improves the synthetic pipeline from 92.6% accuracy to about 97%, with 83.1% error correction and F1=96.6%. Total validation cost is $290.50, or $22.83 per 1,000 products.

score.rationale_zh: 电商数据质量和大规模标注强相关，实验覆盖成本、协议一致性、人类一致性和清洗效果。未发现公开代码，已复现 toy 版多模型 arena + 属性抽取训练/测试 pipeline。

papers.title: E-GEO: A Testbed for Generative Engine Optimization in E-Commerce
papers.source: arXiv v2 / 今日巡检电商 LLM 推荐相关论文

zh.method_overview: E-GEO 研究 LLM shopping agent 时代商品内容如何影响生成式引擎排序。论文构建 13,747 条多句真实消费查询，每条配 10 个 Amazon listing，并在 5 个 LLM re-ranker、7 个 LLM rewriter 和 15 个手写启发式 prompt 上做大规模对比。进一步把 GEO 写成 prompt meta-optimization：元优化器根据历史排名反馈迭代生成更有效的描述改写 prompt。高光点是把电商内容优化从经验 SEO 迁移到可测量、可优化、可红队验证的 LLM re-ranking 问题。
zh.story: 传统 SEO 经验无法直接解释 LLM shopping agent 为什么推荐某个商品 -> 电商需要可量化的生成式引擎优化 benchmark 与算法 -> E-GEO 用查询-listing 数据集、跨引擎 leaderboard 和 prompt meta-optimizer 研究哪些内容改写能真实提升排序。
zh.innovation: 创新点在任务定义和实验体系：以商品排序提升作为 GEO 的经济代理指标，比网页曝光分更贴近电商；meta-optimizer 相比手写 prompt 更数据驱动。论文还加入 adversarial red-team 与 in-prompt defense，尝试区分真实内容改善和操纵排序。
zh.key_metrics: E-GEO 包含 13,747 queries，test set 2,000 queries；人工抽样审计显示 Q1/Q2 100% Yes，相关商品数平均 8.81/10，自然度 4.30/5；启发式 prompt 多数不稳定，11/15 个差于 simple prompt；meta-optimization 相对初始化 prompt 在多 re-ranker 上带来最高 +2.24 的 mean rank improvement。

en.method_overview: E-GEO studies how product content affects ranking in LLM-powered shopping agents. It builds 13,747 realistic multi-sentence consumer queries, each paired with 10 Amazon listings, and evaluates five LLM re-rankers, seven LLM rewriters, and fifteen handcrafted prompts. It then formulates GEO as prompt meta-optimization, where a meta-optimizer iteratively proposes rewriting prompts from ranking feedback. The highlight is turning e-commerce content optimization from heuristic SEO into a measurable LLM re-ranking problem with red-team checks.
en.story: Classical SEO heuristics do not explain what LLM shopping agents prefer -> e-commerce needs a measurable benchmark and optimizer for generative engines -> E-GEO combines query-listing data, cross-engine leaderboards, and prompt meta-optimization to study ranking-improving content rewrites.
en.innovation: The innovation is in task framing and empirical design: product rank improvement is a more marketplace-relevant metric than generic web exposure scores, and meta-optimization is more data-driven than manual prompt recipes. The paper also red-teams the optimizer to separate genuine content improvement from manipulation.
en.key_metrics: E-GEO contains 13,747 queries and a 2,000-query test set. Manual audit reports Q1/Q2 100% Yes, 8.81/10 average relevant products, and 4.30/5 naturalness. Most handcrafted prompts are unstable, with 11 of 15 worse than the simple prompt. Meta-optimization yields up to +2.24 mean-rank-improvement over initialization across re-rankers.

score.rationale_zh: 电商强相关，任务定义与 benchmark 价值高；指标是排名提升而非传统模型 SOTA，实验范围很大但复现依赖外部 LLM。原文页面显示 Website/Code/Data 但检索未能确认可用公开代码仓库，因此已复现 toy 版 meta-optimization pipeline。

papers.title: Video Generation Models are General-Purpose Vision Learners
papers.source: arXiv / Google DeepMind project page / 今日 AI 热点弱相关论文

zh.method_overview: GenCeption 把预训练文本到视频扩散模型改造成统一的 feed-forward 视觉理解模型，用文本指令切换深度估计、表面法线、相机位姿、分割和 3D keypoint 等任务。核心假设是视频生成预训练天然学习时空世界先验和视觉-语言对齐，类似 NLP 中 next-token prediction 对通用能力的作用。后训练阶段主要用合成数据把多种 dense/sparse 任务统一到一个 backbone、head 和 loss 设计中。高光点是“生成即理解”：视频生成模型不只是合成工具，而可能成为通用视觉基座。
zh.story: 计算机视觉仍大量依赖专用任务模型 -> 需要类似 LLM 的统一预训练范式 -> GenCeption 用视频生成预训练提供时空先验，再用指令化多任务后训练统一多种视觉任务。
zh.innovation: 创新性很强但与电商治理为弱相关。与 V-JEPA、VideoMAE 等表征预训练不同，它直接复用 text-to-video diffusion backbone 并转成单步前向感知模型；对电商可迁移到商品视频理解、图文一致性和达人短视频结构化标签，但论文没有直接治理实验。
zh.key_metrics: 论文报告 GenCeption 在深度、法线、相机位姿、分割、3D keypoint 等任务上匹配或超过 DepthAnything3、SAM3、D4RT、VGGT-Ω、Sapiens、DAVID、Genmo、Lotus-2 等专用模型；相对 D4RT/VGGT-Ω 可用 7× 到 500× 更少训练数据达到可比效果；项目页显示 Code TBA。

en.method_overview: GenCeption repurposes a pretrained text-to-video diffusion model into a unified feed-forward perception model steered by text instructions across depth, normals, camera pose, segmentation, and 3D keypoints. The core hypothesis is that video generation pretraining learns spatiotemporal world priors and vision-language alignment, analogous to next-token prediction in NLP. Multi-task post-training, mainly with synthetic data, unifies dense and sparse tasks under a shared backbone, head, and loss design. The highlight is generation-as-understanding: video generators may become general-purpose vision foundations.
en.story: Computer vision still relies heavily on task-specific specialists -> it needs a general pretraining paradigm like LLMs -> GenCeption uses video generation pretraining for world priors, then instruction-style multi-task post-training for unified perception.
en.innovation: The idea is highly innovative but only weakly tied to e-commerce governance. Unlike V-JEPA or VideoMAE representation pretraining, it reuses a text-to-video diffusion backbone as a single-step perception model. It could transfer to product-video understanding, image-text consistency, and creator-video tagging, but the paper has no direct governance experiment.
en.key_metrics: The paper reports matching or surpassing DepthAnything3, SAM3, D4RT, VGGT-Ω, Sapiens, DAVID, Genmo, and Lotus-2 across depth, normals, camera pose, segmentation, and 3D keypoints. It reaches comparable performance to D4RT/VGGT-Ω with 7x to 500x less training data. The project page lists Code TBA.

score.rationale_zh: AI 热度和方法创新都很高，实验强，但与电商治理只是弱相关。项目页显示 Code TBA；按评分机制低于 80 分，今日不触发强制复现，仅在网页中纳入关注。

papers.title: Real-Time Hard Negative Sampling via LLM-based Clustering for Large-Scale Two-Tower Retrieval
authors: Authors not fully listed in converted metadata
papers.source: arXiv / 今日巡检推荐召回相关论文

zh.method_overview: 该论文提出 GOOBS，用基于内容 embedding 的 item clusters 为两塔召回模型实时生成 hard negatives，解决 in-batch negatives 候选少、OOB negatives 太简单的问题。训练时根据用户正样本所在簇或相近簇动态抽取更难区分的负样本，并配套可在线服务的大规模系统框架。对电商内容生态的价值在于：商品/内容向量化表征、聚类与相似召回可直接服务达人内容推荐、相似商品治理和重复/低质内容发现。
zh.story: 两塔召回训练中的负样本要么太少要么太容易，且会放大流行度偏差 -> 需要实时、可扩展的 hard negative 生成机制 -> GOOBS 用内容 embedding 聚类在线生成更有信息量的负样本。
zh.innovation: 方法工程性强，创新点在将 LLM/多模态内容 embedding 聚类与工业两塔训练/服务闭环结合。相比普通 in-batch/OOB 采样，它能让模型持续看到语义相近但未点击的候选，从而改善召回质量并缓解 popularity bias。
zh.key_metrics: 论文报告 public datasets 与 industrial datasets 均显著优于 in-batch/OOB/mixed negative sampling；生产候选源相对 prior source model 在 served impressions 上获得 +53% CTR improvement，并帮助缓解 popularity bias。

en.method_overview: The paper proposes GOOBS, a real-time hard-negative sampling framework for two-tower retrieval models using clusters derived from content embeddings. Instead of relying on limited in-batch negatives or overly easy out-of-batch negatives, it samples semantically close cluster negatives on the fly during training. For e-commerce content ecosystems, the approach is relevant to item representation, clustering, similarity retrieval, creator-content recommendation, and duplicate/low-quality content discovery.
en.story: Two-tower retrieval negatives are either too few or too easy and can amplify popularity bias -> training needs scalable hard negatives -> GOOBS samples semantically close negatives from content-embedding clusters in real time.
en.innovation: The innovation is mainly engineering-oriented: it closes the loop between LLM/multimodal content embedding clusters and industrial-scale two-tower training/serving. Compared with in-batch or random OOB sampling, it continually exposes the model to semantically similar unclicked items.
en.key_metrics: The paper reports significant gains over in-batch, OOB, and mixed negative sampling on public and industrial datasets. In production, the retrieval source achieves +53% CTR improvement on served impressions relative to the prior source model and helps mitigate popularity bias.

score.rationale_zh: 与向量化表征、聚类、相似召回相关，对内容生态有工程价值，但论文主题偏推荐召回而非内容理解/治理；已有 2026-07-15 复现，不重复实现。
